name: collection_page_5_collections_body

facts.note: No visible sort control appears in the sampled mobile collection view.
No visible filter control appears in the sampled view.
Product cards show badges such as 40% off, new, sold out, and limited.
Multiple product cards visibly show sold-out states.

observed_strengths.observation: The collection shows dense promotional merchandising and clear category segmentation.

missing_or_weak.observation: The collection asks shoppers to browse a long product grid without visible sort or filter controls.

purchase_path_notes: The sampled mobile collection is merchandised aggressively but not visibly optimized for narrowing a large catalog quickly.
